case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MELVINA ZENO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JUL-09-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JUN-04-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZENO, MELVINA AKA MELVINA M HILL $6,297.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,414.00, DEFENDANT WILL PAY THE SUM OF $6414 IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $25 BEGINNING ON 5/20/03 AND PAYABLE ON EACH 20TH DAY OF THE MONTH UNTIL PAYS THE FULL SUM, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA. (212)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-25-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
